reason: Cannot apply fix: environment is non-functional. (1) Bash tool fails on every invocation with `EACCES: permission denied, mkdir '/home/worker/.claude/session-env'`, blocking docker validation, chmod, and any shell work. (2) `/workspace/task/tests/` is read-only for this process — both Edit and Write fail with `EACCES: permission denied, open '/workspace/task/tests/test_outputs.py'`. Writes to `/workspace/task/` root succeed, but not into the tests/ subdir. AskUserQuestion to escalate was declined. The required fix is small and self-contained (loosen empty-check regexes in test_outputs.py:87-92 to accept any identifier name and additional idioms `.empty()`, `.size()==0`, `==""`); a ready-to-apply replacement file is at `/workspace/task/_proposed_test_outputs.py`. To apply manually: `cp /workspace/task/_proposed_test_outputs.py /workspace/task/tests/test_outputs.py`.
